meaning: n.[律]财产增与者,托管财产者
examples: Settlor shall not be named as beneficiary if unnecessary.
The trustee must obey and carry out be directions of the settlor.
Between settlor and trustee, due to the establishment of the trust.
Once again he found a foreign settlor, in a Colombian named Carlos M.
Smith is both the settlor and a beneficiary of the Trust.
